title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Synergy Property Development

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Synergy Property Development
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
